name: 谜题姐妹 Puzzle Sisters
short_description: Easy and interesting question answering game. Feier represents one out of four, and Linger represents one out of two. 100 questions each. Many achievements in Chinese characters can be easily obtained even if you don't understand Chinese.
detailed_description:
The current version is a reprint of Sister Puzzle.
The previous version was not satisfactory, and the whole was remade with RPGMAKER MZ.
Easy and interesting question answering game.
Feier represents one out of four, and Linger represents one out of two.
100 questions each, which may be updated irregularly in the future.
The number of correctly answered questions will unlock more NPCs and more snacks to enrich the scene. Each snack corresponds to a behind-the-scenes production. Many sketches may not have been seen by the internal staff of the development team.
There are members of the development team and the game characters made by the black demon who have been guest stars as NPCs.
Many achievements in Chinese characters can be easily obtained even if you don't understand Chinese.
The style of the achievement Chinese characters is consistent with that of "Consummate", which can be combined to enrich the STEAM home page display cabinet.
It is easy to achieve full success.
Friendly developers, willing to communicate and support updates.

当前版本为《谜题姐妹》重制版。
之前的版本不满意，整个用RPGMAKER MZ回炉重制了。

轻松有趣的答题游戏。
菲儿代表四选一，玲儿代表对与错二选一。
各100题，以后有可能会不定期更新。
答对题目数量会陆续解锁更多NPC，还会解锁更多小零食，让场景更加丰富，每个零食对应着一幅幕后制作花絮。很多草图可能是开发组内部人员都没看过的。
有开发组成员和黑妖之前做的游戏角色客串当NPC。
很多汉字成就，即便不懂中文也可以轻松获得。
成就汉字和《寇莎梅特》的风格一致，可以组合使用丰富自己的STEAM首页展柜。
很容易获得全成就。
友好的开发者，乐于沟通，支持更新。
